About Commercial Services Courier Services Get a Quote Contact Us

« Move Removals »

Move Removals are the premier removals and courier service in Greater Manchester. If you've got something that needs shifting from one place to another, we've got the skills and the van.

Move Removals was founded in 2022, which makes it one of the most successful young removals companies in the world. Our prices are very reasonable

Professional Handling
You can trust Move Removals to handle your possessions with the upmost care, safety and security.
Whenever, Wherever
It doesn't matter what you want moving or where it is, we can handle it.
Fully Tracked
With end-to-end tracking you'll have peace of mind about exactly where your possessions are at every moment during your move.
Above and Beyond
At Move Removals we go the extra mile, sometimes literally. We don't count flights of stairs or the number of boxes, if it can be moved we'll get it.

« The Areas We Cover »

  • Oldham
  • Rochdale
  • Stockport
  • Trafford
